title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: 'Just response to Russian strikes' – Ukraine hit major oil refinery in Moscow, Zelensky confirms. Ukraine hit the Moscow Oil Refinery in the Kapotnya district of Russia's capital on June 16. The refinery is responsible for about 40% of the Moscow region's demand for petroleum products.
description_en: 'Just response to Russian strikes' – Ukraine hit major oil refinery in Moscow, Zelensky confirms. Ukraine hit the Moscow Oil Refinery in the Kapotnya district of Russia's capital on June 16. The refinery is responsible for about 40% of the Moscow region's demand for petroleum products.

description: Russia's foreign election meddling has a losing record. Experts explain why President Vladimir Putin has never lost an election in Russia. Outside Russia's borders, however, the Kremlin has been learning a different lesson. From Moldova to Hungary — and, more recently, Armenia — Moscow has poured money and political capital into influencing elections abroad. Yet, time and again, the candidates...

title: Air defense active
description: And this is already the sky over Ukraine. Interesting footage, where the camera of the interceptor drone "Sting" chasing the Russian Shahed captures the work of the second interceptor drone "Merops", which also decided to choose the same Shahed as a target, but it misses and flies past. These shots are pleasing because if such episodes are already on video, it means that the sky is saturated with our interceptor drones at the very...
description_en: And this is already the sky over Ukraine. Interesting footage, where the camera of the interceptor drone "Sting" chasing the Russian Shahed captures the work of the second interceptor drone "Merops", which also decided to choose the same Shahed as a target, but it misses and flies past. These shots are pleasing because if such episodes are already on video, it means that the sky is saturated with our interceptor drones at the very...
description_uk: А это уже небо над Украиной Интересные кадры, где камера дрона-перехватчика "Sting", преследующего российский Шахед, фиксирует работу другого дрона-перехватчика "Merops", который тоже решил выбрать в качестве цели тот самый Шахед, но промахивается и пролетает мимо. Эти кадры радуют тем, что если такие эпизоды уже попадают на видео, значит насыщенность неба нашими дронами-перехватчиками на самом...

title: 60 drones intercepted
description: Moscow Mayor Sobyanin cheerfully reports that during the massive attack on the capital of Mordor, about 60 drones have already been shot down. Yeah, shot down. High-rise buildings and refineries.

title: Kyiv: Drone attack
description: Drone attack sparks fire at oil depot in Russia's Krasnodar Krai. A fire broke out at an oil depot in Russia's Krasnodar Krai overnight on June 16 after drone debris fell on the facility, local authorities said.

title: Airstrike attack on residential area
description: During a meeting with President Guy Parmelain after his arrival in Geneva, he thanked Switzerland for all the support provided and, in particular, for its willingness to help bring peace closer. Informed Mr. President about constant Russian attacks and our needs to strengthen air defense. He spoke about the situation at the front and Ukrainian long-range sanctions. Our middle strikes and deep strikes quite rightly force Russia...

Our middle strikes and deep strikes quite rightly force Russia...

Поінформував пана Президента про постійні російські атаки й наші потреби для посилення ППО. Розповів про ситуацію на фронті та українські далекобійні санкції. title: Kharkiv: 6 injured
description: 'Missile struck those who save lives' — 4 rescuers killed, 6 injured in Russian double-tap strike on Kharkiv. Kharkiv City Emergency Department Director Bohdan Hladkykh told Suspilne that one of the missiles struck approximately 30 meters from rescuers who had left the grounds of a civilian enterprise hit in the attack and were standing in a forest belt.

title: Casualties reported
description: 👨‍🚒 Moscow kills those who save lives 🕯️We bow our heads in sorrow for the emergency services rescuers who died in Kharkiv while saving lives. They arrived at the site of the enemy attack to help the victims, but Moscow cynically struck again just as the emergency services were working. 🫡 Eternal memory and honor to the Heroes who, until their last breath, remained faithful to their duty and saved others...
